creator: dean@odyssey.apana.org.au
text:
Revised Port: www/web-traceroute

Updated depend to www/apache20, as requested.

Fix: PORTNAME=      web-traceroute
 PORTVERSION=   3.0
+PORT_REVISION= 1
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.carpe.net/src/ \
                http://www.wa.apana.org.au/~dean/sources/ \
@@ -16,7 +17,7 @@
 MAINTAINER=    dean@odyssey.apana.org.au
 COMMENT=       WWW Traceroute CGI script written in C

-RUN_DEPENDS=   ${LOCALBASE}/sbin/httpd:${PORTSDIR}/www/apache13
+RUN_DEPENDS=   ${LOCALBASE}/sbin/httpd:${PORTSDIR}/www/apache20

 pre-configure:
                sh ${SCRIPTDIR}/locate-template.sh
